About Me

Turning manual work
into smart workflows

I'm John Christian De Guzman, an AI Automation Specialist based in the Philippines with 4+ years in customer service and technical support — and a sharp pivot into automation engineering over the past year.

I build end-to-end systems using GoHighLevel, Zapier, Make.com, and n8n that handle lead pipelines, CRM automation, AI-powered responses, and data routing — without a single line of manual work.

My background in technical support means I don't just automate — I understand the customer journey, troubleshoot edge cases, and build systems that actually hold up in production.

What I Do

Services

I help businesses stop doing things manually. Here's what I can build for you.

⚙️
Workflow Automation
End-to-end automation using Zapier, Make.com, and n8n. Connect your apps, eliminate manual tasks, and let data flow automatically between your tools.
🏗️
CRM Setup & Automation
Full GoHighLevel, HubSpot, or Salesforce setup with pipeline stages, lead scoring, automated follow-ups, and SMS/email sequences.
🤖
AI Integration
Connect Claude, ChatGPT, or custom LLMs into your workflows for intelligent auto-replies, content generation, ticket routing, and data analysis.
📊
Lead Pipeline Automation
Capture leads from forms, ads, or websites — automatically log them to your CRM, trigger nurture sequences, and notify your team instantly.
💬
Customer Support Automation
Build AI-powered support systems that classify tickets, route them to the right team, and send instant acknowledgement emails — 24/7.
🗄️
Database & Reporting
Airtable databases with automated intake forms, custom views, and live syncing to your CRM and reporting tools — no manual exports.
